description:
Run the Muncie HEC-RAS unsteady flow simulation (Plan 04) and verify mass conservation by analyzing the output HDF5 file (Muncie.p04.hdf). Create a Python script to calculate the mass balance error percentage between the most upstream and most downstream cross-sections using trapezoidal integration for volume calculations. Save the findings to /home/ga/Documents/hec_ras_results/volume_conservation.json using the following JSON structure:

{
  "upstream_station": "<station_id>",
  "downstream_station": "<station_id>",
  "total_inflow_volume_ft3": <float>,
  "total_outflow_volume_ft3": <float>,
  "peak_inflow_ft3_per_s": <float>,
  "peak_outflow_ft3_per_s": <float>,
  "volume_difference_ft3": <float>,
  "mass_balance_error_percent": <float>,
  "simulation_duration_hours": <float>,
  "conservation_acceptable": <bool>,
  "num_time_steps": <int>,
  "num_cross_sections": <int>
}

Set conservation_acceptable to true if the mass balance error is less than 5.0%.
